title: What the design-to-code loop unlocks
summary: With work moving more fluidly between code and canvas, workflows aren’t just changing—they’re converging.

title: PGKeeper: Building the bouncer we needed for Postgres
summary: This is the story of why and how we built PGKeeper, a scalable and reliable service to support Figma’s rapidly growing products and database workload.

title: Workflow lab: Expanding the canvas with Figma MCP
summary: As teams build faster, design and code can drift apart just as quickly. This workflow shows how to close that gap—bringing real product states onto the canvas so designers can shape what actually ships.
